title: Pre-qualification notice for local subcontractors
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Pre-qualification applications are hereby invited for Local Enterprises located within ward 1 to 15 of the Mossel Bay Municipality, as sub-contractors for Contract No. C0964.02: Upgrade of TR33/1 at Beach Boulevard West (KM 10.27) to Garret Street (KM 13.05).","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Pre-qualification applications are hereby invited for Local Enterprises located within ward 1 to 15 of the Mossel Bay Municipality, as sub-contractors for Contract No. C0964.02: Upgrade of TR33/1 at Beach Boulevard West (KM 10.27) to Garret Street (KM 13.05)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The proposed Work Packages are as follows:","html":" The proposed Work Packages are as follows:"},{"type":"list","items":["Concrete block paving - Pack 1","Concrete block paving - Pack 2","Concrete block paving - Pack 3"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An active CIDB contractor grading designation of 1 CE to 2 CE is a requirement for the sub-contract work.","html":" An active CIDB contractor grading designation of 1 CE to 2 CE is a requirement for the sub-contract work."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Compulsory Briefing Session:A compulsory information briefing meeting will be held at the Mossel Bay Town Hall Offices at 101 Marsh Street, Mossel Bay Central, Mossel Bay on 11 December 2024 at 10:00.","html":"Compulsory Briefing Session:
A compulsory information briefing meeting will be held at the Mossel Bay Town Hall Offices at 101 Marsh Street, Mossel Bay Central, Mossel Bay on 11 December 2024 at 10:00."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Attendance at the compulsory briefing meeting will be limited to a maximum of two authorized Representatives per entity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Briefing meeting attendance pre-registration process:Prospective tenderers must undergo an online pre-registration process to be eligible for the mandatory briefing meeting. During this process, they are required to submit their valid CIDB grading certificate in the appropriate category of work or classification.","html":"Briefing meeting attendance pre-registration process:
Prospective tenderers must undergo an online pre-registration process to be eligible for the mandatory briefing meeting. During this process, they are required to submit their valid CIDB grading certificate in the appropriate category of work or classification."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Joint Ventures are not allowed to participate in the category of CIDB contractor grading designation of 1 CE to 2 CE."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Submission of pre-registration documentation is required through e-mail to [email protected] and must be completed no later than 12:00 noon on 9 December 2024.","html":"Submission of pre-registration documentation is required through e-mail to [email protected] and must be completed no later than 12:00 noon on 9 December 2024."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No entries after 15 minutes of the Briefing commencement. Pre-Qualification Documentation:Only pre-registered subcontractors will be allowed to attend the compulsory briefing meeting.","html":"No entries after 15 minutes of the Briefing commencement. Pre-Qualification Documentation:
Only pre-registered subcontractors will be allowed to attend the compulsory briefing meeting."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pre-qualification application documents will only be made available at the information briefing meeting. Attendance at the meeting is mandatory, and representation must be by the applicant or an authorized representative directly employed by the applicant.","html":"Pre-qualification application documents will only be made available at the information briefing meeting. Attendance at the meeting is mandatory, and representation must be by the applicant or an authorized representative directly employed by the applicant."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The completed Pre-qualification and supporting documents shall be sealed in an envelope or package clearly marked “Pre-qualification – Contract No. C0964.02: Upgrade of TR33/1 at Beach Boulevard West (KM 10.27) to Garret Street (KM 13.05)  and shall be delivered by hand into the tender box in the site offices of Entsha Henra at;","html":"The completed Pre-qualification and supporting documents shall be sealed in an envelope or package clearly marked “Pre-qualification – Contract No. C0964.02: Upgrade of TR33/1 at Beach Boulevard West (KM 10.27) to Garret Street (KM 13.05) and shall be delivered by hand into the tender box in the site offices of Entsha Henra at;"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Entsha Henra (PTY) Ltd Site Office, Voorbaai Business Park, Watson Avenue, Mossel Bay by no later than 12:00 noon on 17 January 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Telephonic, telegraphic, telex, facsimile, e-mailed or electronic applications will not be accepted.","html":"Telephonic, telegraphic, telex, facsimile, e-mailed or electronic applications will not be accepted."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No late entries will be accepted Queries relating to issues rising from this document may be addressed to: Xolani Bekani - [email protected]","html":"No late entries will be accepted
Queries relating to issues rising from this document may be addressed to: Xolani Bekani - [email protected]"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Preamble:This Pre-qualification Application document forms part of the procurement process of sub-contractors for Contract No. C0964.02: Upgrade of TR33/1 at Beach Boulevard West (KM 10.27) to Garret Street (KM 13.05).","html":"Preamble:
This Pre-qualification Application document forms part of the procurement process of sub-contractors for Contract No. C0964.02: Upgrade of TR33/1 at Beach Boulevard West (KM 10.27) to Garret Street (KM 13.05)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Successful sub-contractors will enter into an Agreement/Contract with the Main Contractor, Entsha Henra (PTY) LTD, who will be sub-letting part of the Main Contract to Qualifying Emerging Contractors.","html":"Successful sub-contractors will enter into an Agreement/Contract with the Main Contractor, Entsha Henra (PTY) LTD, who will be sub-letting part of the Main Contract to Qualifying Emerging Contractors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
